datasheets.name: Corsair Skyreavers

other.name: Raid and Run
other.description: At the end of the Fight phase, if this unit is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, or if this unit destroyed one or more enemy units in that phase, it can make a Fall Back move of up to D6+2".

datasheets.fluff: Equipped with winged jump packs, Corsair Skyreavers are utilised by Anhrathe commanders as mobile shock troops. Leaping recklessly into the fray, they bring to bear an array of dazzling weaponry, relying upon speed, agility and daring to evade incoming strikes and cut their opponents to shreds.
datasheets.loadout:
■ 1 Skyreaver Felarch
■ 4 Skyreavers

The Skyreaver Felarch is equipped with: blast pistol; corsair blade.
Three Skyreavers are equipped with: shuriken pistol; Corsair blade.
One Skyreaver is equipped with: shredder; close combat weapon.

datasheets.name: Corsair Voidreavers

other.name: Reavers of the Void
other.description: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re‐roll a Hit roll of 1. If the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re‐roll the Hit roll instead.

datasheets.fluff: The skilled and agile warriors known as Voidreavers make up the bulk of most Corsair warbands. With precise volleys of lethal shuriken fire, they can tear through enemy infantry or draw their power swords and storm hostile positions to engage in furious hand‐to‐hand fighting.
datasheets.loadout:
■ 1 Voidreaver Felarch
■ 4-9 Corsair Voidreavers

The Voidreaver Felarch is equipped with: shuriken rifle; power sword; close combat weapon.
Seven Corsair Voidreavers are equipped with: shuriken pistol; power sword; close combat weapon.
One Corsair Voidreaver is equipped with: blaster; shuriken pistol; close combat weapon.
One Corsair Voidreaver is equipped with: shredder; shuriken pistol; close combat weapon.

datasheets.name: Kharseth

other.name: Aethersense (Psychic)
other.description: Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12"of this model.

other.name: Fury of the Void (Psychic)
other.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model’s unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more attacks made with this model’s Dread of the Deep Void. Until the end of the turn, that unit is riven. Each time an AELDARI model from your army makes an attack that targets a riven unit, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of that attack.

datasheets.fluff: The foremost Void Dreamer of Prince Yriel’s Eldritch Raiders, Kharseth often leads raiding bands in their own right. At such times, they employ the full breadth of their psychosensory powers to locate valuable prizes and to isolate the positions of enemy forces set to defend them; this achieved, they use their deadliest abilities against the foe as they lead the strike to seize Yriel’s due.
datasheets.leader: This model can be attached to the following units: ■ CORSAIR VOIDREAVERS
datasheets.loadout:
■1 Kharseth - EPIC HERO

This model is equipped with: Dread of the Deep Void; Waystave.

datasheets.name: Wave Serpent

damaged.description: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

other.name: Wave Serpent Shield
other.description: Each time a ranged attack targets this model, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this model, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

datasheets.fluff: The leading troop carriers in a craftworld’s arsenal, Wave Serpents transport warriors to any part of the battlefield at immense speeds. These troops are protected by a powerful energy field and receive covering fire from the vehicle’s powerful array of heavy weapons.
datasheets.loadout:
■ 1 Wave Serpent

This model is equipped with: twin shuriken catapult; twin starcannon; wraithbone hull.
datasheets.transport: This model has a transport capacity of 12 AELDARI INFANTRY models. It cannot transport JUMP PACK models.

stratagems.name: Encircling Blades
stratagems.target: One destroyed CORSAIR VOIDREAVERS or CORSAIR SKYREAVERS unit from your army. You can use this Stratagem on that unit even though it is destroyed.
stratagems.when: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.
stratagems.effect: Add a new unit to your army identical to your destroyed unit, at its original Starting Strength. Set that unit up anywhere on the battlefield wholly within 9"of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.fluff: Aeldari Corsairs employ swift strategic manoeuvres to strike at their enemies from unexpected angles, and with forces the foe did not even suspect were arrayed against them.

stratagems.name: Fade and Strike
stratagems.when: Your Movement phase, just after an AELDARI unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.fluff: Piratical warriors hailing from a dying species, Aeldari Corsairs place no value on gruelling stand-up fights. Instead, they hit hard, flit away, and strike again, remaining out of their enemies’ reach even as they slay them.

stratagems.name: Boarders’ Barrage
stratagems.target: One ANHRATHE unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy VEHICLE or MONSTER unit that is not within Engagement Range of one or more units from your army and is within 8"of your unit. Roll six D6:for each 3+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.fluff: Anhrathe warriors typically carry esoteric grenades such as haywire or monofilament charges intended for rapidly clearing corridors during boarding actions. Such weapons also prove their worth on the open battlefield.

enhancements.name: Tide Watcher
enhancements.description: Once per battle round, this unit can perform an Agile Manoeuvre without spending a Battle Focus token to do so. It can do so even if other units have done so in the same phase, and doing so does not prevent other units from performing the same Agile Manoeuvre in the same phase.

enhancements.name: Glittering Haze
enhancements.description: The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.
